name: Cargo Shop Simulator
short_description: Discover the excitement of commerce with Cargo Shop Simulator! Manage your own cargo shop and grow by meeting customer demands. In the evening, load your shipments onto vehicles and plan deliveries to build a successful business empire. Are you ready?
detailed_description: In Cargo Shop Simulator, easily measure and weigh your customers' packages. Inquire about the contents, their destination, and whether they are fragile. Collect payments and label the packages according to their destination. Transport your packages individually or in bulk on pallets, or allow a transport robot to assist you. At the end of the day, load the packages onto vehicles based on their destinations and send them off. Enjoy the experience of running a cargo shop! We plan to introduce features such as fast shipping areas, filling the inside of the box, and rewards and penalties based on the box's fragility soon.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Turkish
